search_terms_used: caffeine endurance running performance meta-analysis PubMed
beetroot nitrate running economy systematic review PubMed
iron deficiency running performance systematic review
vitamin D endurance athletes performance meta-analysis
beta alanine endurance running performance meta-analysis PubMed
sodium bicarbonate running performance systematic review
creatine endurance athletes systematic review PubMed
coverage_notes: Strong coverage across all target supplement categories. Caffeine has 3 papers (2 meta-analyses + ISSN position stand). Nitrates covered by 1 large meta-analysis + 1 running-specific RCT. Iron has 3 papers (2 systematic reviews + 1 meta-analysis on oral supplementation). Vitamin D has 2 papers (1 systematic review in elite athletes + 1 prevalence meta-analysis). Beta-alanine has 3 papers (2 meta-analyses + 1 running-specific RCT). Sodium bicarbonate has 3 papers (1 umbrella review + 1 systematic review by duration + 1 running-specific meta-analysis). Creatine has 2 papers (1 meta-analysis + 1 narrative review). All DOIs verified via PubMed. Good mix of meta-analyses, systematic reviews, position stands, and RCTs. Running-specific populations well represented where evidence exists.

papers.title: Effects of Caffeine Intake on Endurance Running Performance and Time to Exhaustion: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analysis of 21 RCTs examining caffeine's ergogenic effects on endurance running time trials and time to exhaustion.

papers.title: The Effect of Acute Caffeine Ingestion on Endurance Performance: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analysis of 46 studies examining acute caffeine ingestion (3-6 mg/kg) on endurance performance across multiple exercise modalities.

papers.title: International Society of Sports Nutrition Position Stand: Caffeine and Exercise Performance
papers.journal: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
papers.notes: ISSN position stand providing comprehensive evidence-based analysis of caffeine supplementation effects on exercise performance across sport modalities.

papers.title: Ergogenic Effect of Nitrate Supplementation: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
papers.notes: Large meta-analysis of 80 studies (111 datasets) examining nitrate supplementation effects on exercise performance across modalities.

papers.title: No Differences Between Beetroot Juice and Placebo on Competitive 5-km Running Performance: A Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial
papers.journal: International Journal of Sport Nutrition and Exercise Metabolism
papers.notes: Double-blind RCT examining acute beetroot juice supplementation on competitive 5-km time trial performance in 70 recreational runners.

papers.title: Iron deficiency, supplementation, and sports performance in female athletes: A systematic review
papers.journal: Journal of Sport and Health Science
papers.notes: Systematic review of 23 studies examining iron deficiency prevalence, supplementation protocols, and performance effects in 669 female athletes across 16 sports.

papers.title: Iron Status and Physical Performance in Athletes
papers.notes: Systematic review of 11 studies examining the relationship between iron status parameters and physical performance outcomes in athletes.

papers.title: Effects of Oral Iron Supplementation on Blood Iron Status in Athletes: A Systematic Review, Meta-Analysis and Meta-Regression of Randomized Controlled Trials
papers.notes: Meta-analysis of 13 RCTs examining oral iron supplementation effects on blood iron status markers and VO2max in 449 athletes.

papers.title: Effects of Vitamin D Supplementation in Elite Athletes: A Systematic Review
papers.notes: Systematic review of 14 RCTs examining vitamin D supplementation effects on aerobic endurance, anaerobic power, and strength in 482 elite athletes.

papers.title: Prevalence of vitamin D inadequacy in athletes: a systematic-review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analysis of 23 studies quantifying vitamin D inadequacy prevalence across 2,313 athletes by sport type, geography, and season.

papers.title: β-alanine supplementation to improve exercise capacity and performance: a systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Large meta-analysis of 40 studies (1,461 participants) examining beta-alanine effects on exercise capacity and performance across various exercise durations.

papers.title: Effects of β-alanine supplementation on exercise performance: a meta-analysis
papers.notes: Early meta-analysis of 15 studies (360 participants) establishing beta-alanine's ergogenic effect for exercise lasting 60-240 seconds.

papers.title: Effects of sodium bicarbonate supplementation on exercise performance: an umbrella review
papers.journal: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
papers.notes: Umbrella review of 8 meta-analyses evaluating sodium bicarbonate supplementation effects across exercise types including high-intensity running.

papers.title: Effects of Creatine Monohydrate on Endurance Performance in a Trained Population: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analysis of 13 studies examining creatine monohydrate supplementation effects on endurance performance in trained athletes.
